c.d: Compares prices across multiple retailers, both online and local, to find the best deals for a specific item.
Identifies and applies available coupons and promo codes for online and in-store purchases to maximize savings.
Offers cash back or rebates on purchases made through the app or by submitting receipts after purchase.
Allows users to scan product barcodes to quickly compare prices and find deals.
Notifies users when the price of a tracked item drops to a desired level.
Provides access to product reviews from other customers to aid in purchase decisions.
Highlights local, in-store deals and offers based on the user's location.
